PC-01-001.title: “Morning Light, Quiet Confidence”
PC-01-001.purpose: Primary homepage hero — the first image every visitor sees
PC-01-001.sceneDescription: A 78-year-old Danish woman with silver hair sits by a large north-facing window in her classic Copenhagen apartment. She wears a soft cashmere cardigan in warm beige. Morning light falls gently across her face. A Premium Care professional in a natural linen uniform sits beside her, not looking at camera, both sharing a quiet moment. The apartment features mid-century modern furniture, oak floors, a single potted plant, and white walls. The mood is peaceful, dignified, and warm. Shot on medium format digital camera. Natural window light only. Shallow depth of field. Editorial photography style. No direct eye contact with camera. No exaggerated smiles. Scandinavian interior design. Film-like colour rendering with muted tones.
PC-01-001.cameraNotes: Hasselblad X2D, 16-bit colour, natural contrast, film-like rendering. 50mm equivalent (natural perspective)
PC-01-001.emotionalObjective: To immediately communicate that Premium Care is about dignity, calm, and human connection — not medical intervention
PC-01-001.composition: Two-shot, subjects positioned left of centre, large window creates negative space right, shallow depth of field (f/2.8), generous headroom
PC-01-001.lighting: Large north-facing window, overcast morning light, soft shadows on the right side of faces
PC-01-001.wardrobe: Client: cashmere cardigan (warm beige), wool trousers (charcoal). Care professional: natural linen uniform (soft grey), leather shoes
PC-01-001.usageNotes: Homepage — Hero Section 1 (full-bleed, above the fold) | It shows care as a natural part of life, not a medical intervention. The client is not a patient — she is a person in her own home, respected and comfortable. The absence of medical equipment and the presence of her personal space communicates that Premium Care preserves identity and independence.
PC-01-001.environment: Classic Danish apartment, high ceilings, large windows, mid-century chair, oak floors, single healthy plant, minimal but personal objects
PC-01-001.emotion: Peaceful contentment, quiet companionship, dignified calm
